title: QoL Primer
description: A modpack to serve as a base for your own creations!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1uTXOIMZ/images/1337e1cd8fc900ba8ebf0b89acda6bc156be1513.png)
## This is the QoL Primer Pack!
It's primary use is to serve as a base for aspiring modpack developers that just need a little base to get started. I myself needed this just to screw around with some mods without having to spend an hour just getting my basics in.

Almost no content mods are added, and everything in this pack is to help enhance the modded experience. In case you use this to publish your own pack, you need to give proper credit, including a link to this modrinth page. I really hope you enjoy it! :D
